MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT NUNES JOHN L. HEARING SET FOR APR-16-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NUNES JOHN L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELL SHANE K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNES JOHN L. $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT IS MODIFIED TO PROVIDE FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF $50 PER MONTH, COMMENCING 5/1/96 & PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE THE IST OF EACH SUCCEEDING
MONTH. IF DEFT IS LATE OR MISSED AN INSTALLMENT, THE BALANCE REMAINING DUE SHALL BE ACCELERATED. PAYMNT IS TO BE MAILED OR DELIVERED TO PLTF
